title: Daddy's Home
wikitext:
{{Has quick guide|mini=1}} {{Infobox Miniquest |name = Daddy's Home |image = [[File:Daddy's Home.png|300px]] |release = [[26 August]] [[2020]] |update = Mahogany Homes |members = Yes |series = None |developer = Ashleigh B{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1367490819834466314|date=4 March 2021|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/104407|archivedate=9 April 2022}} }} '''Daddy's Home''' is a [[miniquest]] released with the [[Mahogany Homes]] update, in which the player helps [[Old Man Yarlo|Marlo's father]] renovate a recently squatted house. ==Details== {{Quest details |description = Marlo's father requires someone to refurnish his disastrous house. |start = Speak to [[Marlo]] in the Estate Agent's house in north-east Varrock. |startmap = 3240,3474 |difficulty = Novice |length = Short |members = Yes |requirements = None |items = *10 [[plank]]s – (oak/teak/mahogany will '''not''' work) *5 [[bolts of cloth]] (can be bought from the [[Sawmill]] for 650 coins per bolt) *At least 16 [[nails]] of any type, e.g. [[steel nails]] (more are recommended as nails bend when building furniture. 100 is recommended at 1 [[Construction]], obtainable from the [[Sawmill]] during the quest) *[[Hammer]] (Obtainable during the quest from Yarlo) *[[Saw]] (Obtainable during the quest) |recommended = *Fast travel to several locations **[[Varrock]] to start the quest - [[Varrock Teleport]] or [[Ring of wealth]] to [[Grand Exchange]] or [[Skills necklace]] to [[Cooks' Guild]] or [[Chronicle]] **[[Lumberyard]] east of [[Varrock]] (1 trip) - [[Lumberyard Teleport]] or [[Ring of the elements]] to [[Earth Altar]] |leagueRegion = Not completable, as it requires access to Misthalin. }} ==Walkthrough== {{Map|mtype=pin|align=right|caption=Map for the miniquest |3240,3473,title:[[Marlo]],desc: |3240,3394,title:[[Old Man Yarlo]],desc: |3303,3493,title:[[Sawmill operator]],desc: }} ===Starting out=== Begin the miniquest by speaking to [[Marlo]] in the house of the [[Varrock]] [[Estate Agent]] in north-east Varrock. He will ask you if you would be willing to complete an off-the-books favour for him by helping his father renovate his recently acquired house, explaining that the landlord isn't exactly aware of his presence there. He will direct you to [[Old Man Yarlo]] in his house in south-east Varrock, south-west of [[Aubury's Rune Shop]]. There is a saw on the ground in the same building as Marlo. ===Yarlo's house=== '''''Items required:''' 10 [[planks]], 5 [[bolt of cloth|bolts of cloth]], a [[hammer]], and a [[saw]].''
'''''Items recommended:''' At least 60 [[nails]] of any type.'' Speak to [[Old Man Yarlo]] and he'll ask you to remove all of the old furniture in the house: a chair, a carpet, two tables, two stools, and his campbed. You must right click the carpet for the option to remove to appear. If you interrupt the cutscene you will have to rewatch it. Once this is done, speak with him again to be given the option to view a cutscene showing the wonders of the Construction skill, or skip it to watch later. Once this is done, Old Man Yarlo will ask you to build him new furniture. Everything except the bed can be built now, however the bed requires a special type of wood; search the [[crates (Daddy's Home)|crates]] in the kitchen to receive three [[waxwood log]]s, and bring them to the [[sawmill]]. [[File:Daddy's Home - removing daddy's furniture.png|thumb|300px|Removing furniture from the residence.]] {| class="wikitable" !Furniture!!Item requirements !Experience |- |Carpet||3 bolts of cloth |45 xp |- |2 wooden stools||2 planks and 4 nails in total |30 xp per stool |- |2 wooden tables||6 planks and 8 nails in total |87 xp per table |- |Wooden chair||2 planks and 2 nails |58 xp |- |Waxwood bed||3 waxwood planks and 2 bolts of cloth |207 xp |} ===Finishing up=== '''''Items required:''' 3 [[waxwood log]]s.'' Go to the [[Varrock sawmill]] and talk to the [[sawmill operator]] to receive 3 [[waxwood plank]]s. Since he knows of Old Man Yarlo, he'll provide them free of charge. Return to Old Man Yarlo's home and build the new furniture (chair, carpet, two tables, two stools, and the bed). Speak to [[Old Man Yarlo]] again, he'll thank you and offer the player the basics and benefits of [[Construction]]. Finally, return to [[Marlo]] to claim your reward. ==Reward== *{{SCP|Construction|400|link=yes}} experience **An additional {{SCP|Construction|544|link=yes}} experience is gained when building the furniture, for a total of 944 experience. *A [[player-owned house]] in [[Rimmington]] or 1,000 [[coins]] if you already own one. *[[Marlo's crate]], which contains 25 [[plank]]s, 50 [[mithril nails]], 5 [[steel bar]]s, 10 [[oak plank]]s, 8 [[Bolt of cloth|bolts of cloth]], 5 [[Teleport to house (tablet)|house teleports]], and 1 [[Falador teleport (tablet)|Falador teleport]], a total value of {{NoCoins|{{GEP|Plank|25}}+{{GEP|Mithril nails|50}}+{{GEP|Steel bar|5}}+{{GEP|Oak plank|10}}+{{GEP|Bolt of cloth|8}}+{{GEP|Teleport to house (tablet)|5}}+{{GEP|Falador teleport (tablet)|1}}|c}}. ==Transcript== {{Hastranscript|miniquest}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Daddy's Home}} {{Miniquests}}
